title: 美妆产品广告图
prompt:
[中文]
为Z世代设计的可爱Y2K风格的平价化妆品广告图像。使用鲜艳的配色，包括荧光色。纵横比为3:4。

[English]
Cute Y2K style affordable cosmetics advertising image designed for Gen Z. Using vibrant color schemes, including neon colors. Aspect ratio is 3:4.
